verdict: This is a well-formulated antioxidant serum with the proven Vitamin E + Ferulic combination that enhances photoprotection. Excellent stability and efficacy at a reasonable luxury price.

_research.name: Vitamin E Ferulic Serum
pros: Clinically studied Vitamin E + Ferulic synergy
_research.con: Not ideal as standalone treatment; requires pairing with sunscreen for full benefit.
